summary: Draft systems R3 handoff for the QA R2 coordination-metadata repair. The proposed state aligns lifecycle, readiness, root actions, continuation semantics, active threads, and active routes on RR0 Exit QA R3 review while preserving the R1 freeze and recorded runtime risk. Final REVIEW status remains pending post-application validation and real commit binding.

decisions.decision: Repair only top-level lifecycle, readiness, action, continuation, route, and operational-thread metadata. Do not rewrite historical nested records.
Final operational participants are the unique Lead and the same qa_reviewer. The systems_architect thread is retained historically but closed operationally after this handoff.
Keep R1 frozen and retain the R4 authoritative Web/Electron runtime gap as an R1 risk without implementing product changes.

risks.summary: Normal Web/Electron paths still lack authoritative Worker command/query/save/load/time-control wiring.
The protected M7 worktree retains 20 pre-existing status entries and was not modified.

blockers.summary: The complete R0 Gate matrix and handoff validator have not yet been rerun against the Lead-applied diff.

requested_action: Do not begin QA review until systems_architect has rerun the complete R0 Gate matrix, replaced PARTIAL with REVIEW, populated tests_run, cleared the validation blocker, and bound the real R3 review commit.
